name_en: New Ophidia stands out in a sea of bags! Retro red and green webbing with the handle and wrist strap, simple yet not common. Paired with a blazer, it looks especially powerful and stylish. Truly a versatile all-rounder.
name_cn:
New Ophidia stands out in a sea of bags! Retro red and green webbing with the handle and wrist strap, simple yet not common. Paired with a blazer, it looks especially powerful and stylish. Truly a versatile all-rounder.
Style No.: 693724
Size: 25.5x19x10cm
